course.title: Lesson 17: The Longest Suspension Bridge in the World
course.audioFilename: 17－The Longest Suspension Bridge in the World.mp3

segments.text: Lesson 17.

translations.zh-Hans: 第17课。

segments.text: The Longest Suspension Bridge in the World.

translations.zh-Hans: 世界上最长的吊桥。

segments.text: Listen to the tape, then answer the question below.

translations.zh-Hans: 听录音，然后回答下面的问题。

segments.text: How is the bridge supported?

translations.zh-Hans: 这座桥由什么支撑？

segments.text: Verrazano, an Italian about whom little is known, sailed into New York Harbor in 1524 and named it Anjulemae.

translations.zh-Hans: 维拉萨诺是一位鲜为人知的意大利人，他于1524年驶入纽约港，并将其命名为安古莱姆。

segments.text: He described it as a very agreeable situation located within two small hills in the midst of which flowed a great river.

translations.zh-Hans: 他形容那里是“两座小山之间一处十分宜人的所在，一条大河从山间流过”。

segments.text: Though Verrazano is by no means considered to be a great explorer, his name will probably remain immortal, for on November 21, 1964, the longest suspension bridge in the

translations.zh-Hans: 尽管维拉萨诺绝算不上伟大的探险家，他的名字却很可能永垂不朽，因为1964年11月21日，世界上最长的吊桥

segments.text: world was named after him.

translations.zh-Hans: 以他的名字命名。

segments.text: The Verrazano Bridge, which was designed by Othmar Amman, joins Brooklyn to Staten Island.

translations.zh-Hans: 维拉萨诺大桥由奥特马尔·阿曼设计，连接布鲁克林和斯塔滕岛。

segments.text: It has a span of 4,260 feet.

translations.zh-Hans: 它的跨度为4,260英尺。

segments.text: The bridge is so long that the shape of the earth had to be taken into account by its designer.

translations.zh-Hans: 这座桥如此之长，设计师甚至必须把地球的弧度考虑在内。

segments.text: Two great towers support four huge cables.

translations.zh-Hans: 两座巨塔支撑着四根粗大的钢缆。

segments.text: The towers are built on immense underwater platforms made of steel and concrete.

translations.zh-Hans: 桥塔建在由钢筋和混凝土制成的巨大水下平台上。

segments.text: The platforms extend to a depth of over 100 feet under the sea.

translations.zh-Hans: 平台深入海底100多英尺。

segments.text: These alone took 16 months to build.

translations.zh-Hans: 仅建造这些平台就用了16个月。

segments.text: Above the surface of the water, the towers rise to a height of nearly 700 feet.

translations.zh-Hans: 水面以上，桥塔高近700英尺。

segments.text: They support the cables from which the bridge has been suspended.

translations.zh-Hans: 它们支撑着悬吊桥身的钢缆。

segments.text: Each of the four cables contains 26,108 lengths of wire.

translations.zh-Hans: 四根钢缆中的每一根都由26,108股钢丝组成。

segments.text: It has been estimated that if the bridge were packed with cars, it would still only be carrying a third of its total capacity.

translations.zh-Hans: 据估计，即使桥上挤满汽车，它所承受的也只有总负荷能力的三分之一。

segments.text: However, size and strength are not the only important things about this bridge.

translations.zh-Hans: 然而，规模和强度并不是这座桥仅有的重要之处。

segments.text: Despite its immensity, it is both simple and elegant, fulfilling its designer's dream to create an enormous object drawn as faintly as possible.

translations.zh-Hans: 尽管体量巨大，它却简洁而优美，实现了设计师的梦想：创造一个“尽可能用轻淡线条勾勒出来的庞然大物”。
